name: update_look
description: Swap out segments of your appearance for image generation. Changes your Look section which selfie MCP uses to generate images.

subsection.description: Which appearance aspect to update: 1_body (physical features), 3_hair (hairstyle/color), 4_attire (outfit/clothing), 5_style (accessories/makeup), 6_place (location/background)

partial.description: Partial filename to match from 070_look subsection

name: inspect
description: Show your current template composition - what persona components are active right now. Reveals which files built you, distinguishing between SLOT sections (only one active) and LIST sections (multiple accumulate).
